title: CRUD операції
description: Виконай Create, Read, Update, Delete за допомогою SQLAlchemy.
starter_code:
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String
from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, Session

Base = declarative_base()

class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'products'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(50))
    price = Column(Integer)

engine = create_engine('sqlite:///:memory:')
Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

with Session(engine) as s:
    # CREATE
    s.add_all([
        Product(name='Ноутбук', price=25000),
        Product(name='Мишка', price=500),
        Product(name='Клавіатура', price=1500)
    ])
    s.commit()

    # READ
    products = s.query(Product).all()
    for p in products:
        print(f'{p.name}: {p.price} грн')

    # UPDATE
    mouse = s.query(Product).filter_by(name='Мишка').first()
    mouse.price = 600
    s.commit()
    print(f'\nОновлено: {mouse.name} = {mouse.price}')

    # DELETE
    s.query(Product).filter_by(name='Клавіатура').delete()
    s.commit()
    print(f'Залишилось: {s.query(Product).count()}')

tests.input:
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String; from sqlalchemy.orm import declarative_base, Session; B=declarative_base(); exec('class T(B):
 __tablename__="t"
 id=Column(Integer,primary_key=True)
 v=Column(String(10))'); e=create_engine('sqlite:///:memory:'); B.metadata.create_all(e); s=Session(e); s.add(T(v='hi')); s.commit(); print(s.query(T).first().v)

explanation: CRUD — базові операції з даними: Create, Read, Update, Delete.
